info.description: RESTful API for Enforcer V2 - Account management, authentication, wallets, multi-tenancy, policy enforcement, storage, and key-value operations.
info.title: Enforcer V2 API

get.description: Returns the JSON Web Key Set containing public keys for JWT verification

post.description: Sends an email to one or more users by user ID. System admins can email any user. Tenant admins can only email users in their own tenant. Developers and regular users cannot access this endpoint.

get.description: Lists groups with optional filtering by tenant, search, and pagination. Admin only.
get.summary: List groups with pagination and search

parameters.description: Search term for name or description
parameters.name: search_term

post.description: Creates a new group with the specified name, description, and tenant ID. Admin only.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or validation error

409.description: Group with same name already exists in tenant

get.description: Retrieves a specific user-group relationship by ID. Admin only.
Lists user-group relationships with pagination. Admin users can see all, others see only their tenant's mappings.
Retrieves all groups that a user is part of by user ID

post.description: Adds a user to multiple groups. Returns detailed results of which groups were successfully added and which failed.

parameters.description: Add user to multiple groups request
parameters.name: request

200.description: User added to groups with detailed results

get.description: Retrieves a group by its ID. Admin only.

put.description: Updates a group by ID. Admin can update any group. Tenant Admin can only update groups in their tenant (enforced by OPA policy). At least one of name or description must be provided.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or validation error

403.description: Forbidden - Admin or Tenant Admin access required

409.description: Group with same name already exists in tenant

delete.description: Soft deletes a group by ID. Admin only.

404.description: Group not found or already deleted

get.description: Retrieves users in the group's tenant that are NOT in this group. Useful for showing which users can be added to a group. Users can access this for groups in their own tenant.

200.description: List of users not in group with pagination

get.description: Retrieves all users in a specific group. Authorization is handled by OPA groups policy - admin can access any group, regular users can only access groups in their own tenant.

200.description: List of users in group with pagination

post.description: Adds a user to an existing group. Requires proper authorization based on groups policy.

parameters.description: Add user to group request (user_id required)
parameters.name: request

delete.description: Removes all users from a specific group. Returns 404 if group is not found.

200.description: All users removed from group successfully

delete.description: Removes a user from a specific group. Requires proper authorization based on groups policy.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or user not in group

post.description: Sends an invitation email to a pre-created inactive user. Looks up user by ID, validates secret against user's tenant. Admins can invite any user; tenant admins can only invite users in their own tenant.
post.summary: Invite a pre-created user to join a tenant

400.description: Invalid request, user already active, or invalid secret

403.description: Forbidden - cannot invite user in another tenant

get.description: Get all verification providers across all tenants

post.description: Create a new verification provider for a tenant

get.description: Get a verification provider by ID

delete.description: Delete a verification provider by ID

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of roles

parameters.description: Number of records per page (1-1000, default: 10)
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Creates a new role with the specified name and permissions

get.description: Retrieves a role by its UUID

put.description: Updates an existing role with new name and/or permissions

delete.description: Deletes a role by its UUID

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all verification sessions across all tenants (admin only)

parameters.description: Number of records per page (1-100, default: 10)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Filter by status (pending, active, verified, expired, revoked, failed)
parameters.name: status

get.description: Returns the user_id and tenant_id for a given external_customer_id from verification sessions.
get.summary: Resolve user by external customer ID

get.description: Retrieves a specific verification session by its ID (admin only)
get.summary: Get a verification session by ID

delete.description: Soft deletes a verification session by ID (admin only)

patch.description: Updates the status of a verification session with admin override (bypasses normal transition rules)

post.description: Atomically transfers a verification session from one user to another on the same tenant. Also transfers the associated group membership if the session has a granted_group_id in metadata.
post.summary: Transfer a verification session between users

parameters.description: Transfer request with from_user_id and to_user_id
parameters.name: request

409.description: Conflict - target user already has a session with this external customer

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of tenants with account counts for admin users

parameters.description: Number of records per page (1-1000, default: 10)
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Creates a new tenant with the specified name, description, and active status

get.description: Retrieves a specific tenant by ID with account count

put.description: Updates an existing tenant with the specified fields. Only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description: Soft deletes a tenant by ID. The tenant will be marked as deleted but not physically removed from the database.

patch.description: Activates an inactive tenant by ID. If the tenant is already active, returns a conflict error.
Deactivates an active tenant by ID. If the tenant is already inactive, returns a conflict error.

get.description: Get all verification providers for a specific tenant

post.description: Create a new verification provider for a specific tenant

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of verification sessions for a specific tenant (admin only)
get.summary: List verification sessions for a tenant

parameters.description: Number of records per page (1-100, default: 10)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all terms documents including inactive ones

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of term IDs to filter by
parameters.name: ids

parameters.description: Filter by terms type (instruxi, privacy, cookies, aml, custom)
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Filter to active terms only (default: false)
parameters.name: active_only

parameters.description: Number of records per page (1-1000, default: 50)
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Creates a new terms document

get.description: Retrieves a specific terms document by ID including inactive ones

put.description: Updates an existing terms document. Only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a terms document and its associated acceptances

post.description: Creates a new user account (admin only). Creates Privy user in Privy mode.

patch.description: Activates multiple user accounts. Tenant admins can only activate users in their own tenant.
Deactivates multiple user accounts. Tenant admins can only deactivate users in their own tenant.

post.description: Permanently deletes multiple users and all their associated data. Tenant admins can only delete users in their own tenant.

get.description: Resolves a user by email, wallet address, or Privy user ID. Exactly one identifier must be provided.
get.summary: Resolve user by email, address, or Privy ID

parameters.description: Optional sections: wallets, auth_providers, stats, privy. Note: verification_sessions are only available via /users/me.
parameters.name: include

post.description: Sets the email_verified and/or phone_number_verified flags for a user. Only admins and tenant admins can use this endpoint.

403.description: Forbidden - admin or tenant admin role required

delete.description: Deletes a user by ID and cascade-deletes all associated data (groups, auth providers, wallets, files, terms acceptances, etc.). This action is irreversible.

patch.description: Activates an inactive user by ID. Admin can activate any user; tenant admin can only activate users in their own tenant.
Deactivates an active user by ID. Admin can deactivate any user; tenant admin can only deactivate users in their own tenant.

delete.description: Removes a user from all groups they belong to.

200.description: User removed from all groups successfully

400.description: Invalid request parameters or user not found

patch.description: Updates a user's profile by admin or API key
Changes the role of a user by ID. Admin only.

403.description: Cannot modify self or insufficient privileges

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of verification sessions for a specific user (admin only)
get.summary: List verification sessions for a user

parameters.description: Number of records per page (1-100, default: 10)
parameters.name: limit

patch.description: Moves a user to a different tenant by ID. Admin only.
patch.summary: Move a user to a different tenant

post.description: Initiates a verification challenge for a specific user. Supports both sync providers (MaxMD - immediate verification) and async providers (Cybrid - webhook-based verification).
post.summary: Initiate a group verification challenge for a user (admin only)

get.description: List API keys for the authenticated user with pagination. Admin users can list other users' keys.

post.description: Create a new API key for the authenticated user or for another user (admin only)

parameters.description: Create API key request (optional for admin users)
parameters.name: req

get.description: Get an API key by its ID for the authenticated user

delete.description: Delete an API key for the authenticated user

patch.description: Set an API key's status to active
Set an API key's status to inactive

get.description: Activates an account using activation code and account address

post.description:
Activates an inactive user account using a tenant secret. Supports two modes:
**Privy mode** (when Privy auth is configured): Provide a Bearer {privy_token} in the Authorization header. The user is identified by their Privy DID.
**Non-Privy mode** (when Privy auth is NOT configured): Provide the user's email in the request body. The user is identified by their email address.

parameters.description: Bearer {privy_token} — required when Privy auth is configured
parameters.name: Authorization

401.description: Missing or invalid Privy token (Privy mode only)

get.description:
Validates an API key and returns the associated account details in a flat format.
This endpoint is designed for inter-service communication (e.g., rwa-gateway)
and does not require a Bearer token — the API key itself is the credential.

200.description: Account details for the API key owner

401.description: Invalid, inactive, or missing API key

post.description: Authorizes a policy based on the provided request. Admins can check any user,

403.description: Forbidden - Cannot check authorization for this user

post.description: Creates a new policy in OPA with the provided Rego file content
Exchanges Google OAuth authorization code for JWT token

403.description: Account inactive or email not verified

post.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP to the provided email address for login verification
post.summary: Send OTP to email for login

post.description: Verifies the OTP code and authenticates the user, creating account if needed
Invalidates the existing nonce for an account and generates a new one

400.description: Invalid request format or ethereum address

get.description: Generates and returns a nonce for the specified Ethereum account address

post.description: Generates WebAuthn authentication options. Provide email/username for server-side credential lookup, or omit for discoverable credential flow.
Validates the WebAuthn assertion response and returns a JWT token
Generates WebAuthn registration options for the authenticated user

parameters.description: Optional friendly name for the credential
parameters.name: req

post.description: Validates the WebAuthn attestation response and stores the credential
Verifies a Privy access/session token and returns an Enforcer JWT token
post.summary: Exchange Privy JWT for Enforcer JWT

post.description: Refresh an existing JWT token and update provider sessions
Registers a new account with signature verification, tenant code support, and email activation
Verifies a Sign-In with Ethereum (SIWE) signature

Verifies the 6-digit OTP and marks the user's email as verified. If the user has no email on file, the email field is required. Admins and tenant admins can specify a user_id to confirm verification for another user.

403.description: Forbidden - admin or tenant admin role required to target another user

post.description: Fetches the user's Privy account by DID, extracts a verified email from their linked accounts, writes it to the database, and marks email_verified = true. Requires the user to have a linked Privy user ID. Admins and tenant admins can specify a user_id to verify another user.

400.description: No Privy user ID or no verified email found

403.description: Forbidden - admin or tenant admin role required to target another user

500.description: Failed to fetch from Privy or update account

post.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP to the user's email address for verification. If the user has no email on file, the email field is required and will be set on the account. Admins and tenant admins can specify a user_id to trigger verification for another user.

400.description: Invalid request or email already verified

403.description: Forbidden - admin or tenant admin role required to target another user

post.description: Verifies the 6-digit OTP and marks the user's phone number as verified. If the user has no phone number on file, the phone_number field is required. Admins and tenant admins can specify a user_id to confirm verification for another user.

400.description: Invalid OTP or missing phone number

403.description: Forbidden - admin or tenant admin role required to target another user

post.description: Fetches the user's Privy account by DID, extracts a verified phone number from their linked accounts (SMS login), writes it to the database, and marks phone_number_verified = true. Requires the user to have a linked Privy user ID. Admins and tenant admins can specify a user_id to verify another user.

400.description: No Privy user ID or no verified phone found

403.description: Forbidden - admin or tenant admin role required to target another user

500.description: Failed to fetch from Privy or update account

post.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP via SMS to the user's phone number for verification. If the user has no phone number on file, the phone_number field is required and will be set on the account. Admins and tenant admins can specify a user_id to trigger verification for another user.

400.description: Invalid request or phone already verified

403.description: Forbidden - admin or tenant admin role required to target another user

get.description: Returns all supported integration capabilities with their available providers. Any authenticated user can call this.
Searches for contacts belonging to the authenticated user

parameters.description: Free-text search across name, username, email, wallet
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Comma-separated required verifications: email, phone — excludes custom contacts when set
parameters.name: require_verified

parameters.description: Filter to contacts whose linked user has a verified session from this provider (e.g. cybrid, facetec) — excludes custom contacts when set
parameters.name: verified_provider

parameters.description: When true, include contacts with expired verification sessions (requires verified_provider)
parameters.name: include_expired

post.description: Creates a new contact for the authenticated user

delete.description: Deletes multiple contacts belonging to the authenticated user

post.description: Bulk creates contacts for the authenticated user

get.description:
Searches for users in the caller's tenant that can be added as contacts.
Excludes the caller and users who are already contacts.
Supports filtering by first_name, last_name, username, email, phone_number, wallet_address, user_id, and free-text search (q).
get.summary: Lookup users to add as contacts

parameters.description: Free-text search across username, email, first_name, last_name, phone_number
parameters.name: q

get.description: Resolves a user ID given a wallet address. Searches auth_providers (SIWE/metamask) and wallet_addresses tables.
Lists users in the authenticated user's tenant that are NOT in their contact list. Useful for suggesting new contacts. Use require_verified to filter by verification status.

parameters.description: Filter to users with a verified session from this provider (e.g. cybrid, facetec)
parameters.name: verified_provider

parameters.description: When true, include users with expired verification sessions (requires verified_provider)
parameters.name: include_expired

get.description: Retrieves a contact by ID for the authenticated user

put.description: Updates a contact belonging to the authenticated user

delete.description: Deletes a contact belonging to the authenticated user

post.description: Links a custom (invite) contact to an existing platform user. The contact must be of type 'custom'.
post.summary: Link a custom contact to a user

400.description: Invalid request or not a custom contact

post.description: Creates a new public or private group owned by the authenticated user. The creator is automatically added as a member.

400.description: Invalid request or no tenant assigned

409.description: Group name already exists in tenant

get.description: Lists all account group relationships with pagination

post.description: Creates a group membership for the authenticated user. The companion admin endpoint is POST /admin/groups/{group_id}/users (addUserToGroup).

delete.description: Removes an account from a specific group

post.description: Adds an account to multiple groups in a batch operation

get.description: Retrieves a specific account group relationship by ID
Returns paginated groups where the authenticated user is the owner (created_by).
get.summary: List groups owned by the authenticated user

get.description: Returns paginated public groups with optional search and sorting.
get.summary: List public groups in the user's tenant

put.description: Updates the name, description, or visibility of a group. Only the group owner can update.

400.description: Invalid request or no update fields

409.description: Group name already exists in tenant

delete.description: Soft-deletes a group and removes all memberships. Only the group owner can delete.

post.description: Adds a user to the group. Only the group owner can invite. Target must be in the same tenant.
post.summary: Invite a user to a group

403.description: Not the group owner or cross-tenant

delete.description: Removes a user from the group. Only the group owner can remove members. Cannot remove the owner.
delete.summary: Remove a user from a group

post.description: Adds the authenticated user as a member of a public group in their tenant.
Removes the authenticated user from a group. Group owners cannot leave (delete the group instead).

404.description: Not a member of this group

get.description: Lists all accounts in a specific group with pagination

delete.description: Removes all accounts from a specific group

get.description: Returns paginated group members. Caller must be a member of the group.

404.description: Group not found or not a member

post.description: Transfers ownership of a group to another user in the same tenant. The new owner must be a member or will be auto-added.

403.description: Not the group owner or cross-tenant

get.description: Returns a paginated list of invites sent by the authenticated user

post.description: Creates an invite for the given email. Always returns the invite link. Optionally sends an email.

409.description: Invite already exists or user already registered

404.description: Invite not found or not pending

Retrieves a value from the user's KV store by key

post.description: Atomically increments a numeric value by the specified delta

post.description: Removes multiple key-value pairs from the user's KV store
Retrieves multiple values from the user's KV store by keys

Stores a key-value pair in the user's KV store with optional TTL

get.description: Returns usage statistics for the user's KV store

400.description: Invalid request, user already in tenant, inactive tenant, or invalid secret

404.description: Account not found or tenant not found

404.description: Secret not found or tenant not found

get.description: List all connections for a tenant. Admin can view any tenant. TenantAdmin and Developer can view their own tenant. Sensitive fields (passwords, API keys) are always redacted in responses regardless of role.

post.description: Create a new connection for a tenant. Admin and TenantAdmin only.

409.description: Connection already exists for this tenant and provider

get.description: Get a specific connection by ID. Admin can view any tenant. TenantAdmin and Developer can view their own tenant. Sensitive fields (passwords, API keys) are always redacted in responses regardless of role.

put.description: Update an existing connection. Admin and TenantAdmin only. Config is fully replaced if provided.

delete.description: Soft-delete a tenant connection. Admin and TenantAdmin only.

get.description: List all active terms documents, optionally filtered by type

parameters.description: Tenant ID to include tenant-specific terms alongside global ones
parameters.name: tenant_id

post.description: Accept a specific terms document (requires authentication)

get.description: Retrieve the current active terms document of a specific type

parameters.description: Terms type (instruxi, privacy, cookies, aml, custom)
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Tenant ID to include tenant-specific terms
parameters.name: tenant_id

post.description: Revoke a previously accepted terms document (requires authentication)

parameters.description: Revoke terms request (uses same structure as accept)
parameters.name: request

post.description: Revoke a previously accepted terms document by its type (requires authentication)

get.description: Get the complete terms acceptance status for the authenticated user
Retrieve a specific terms document by its ID

parameters.description: Tenant ID — required to access tenant-specific terms
parameters.name: tenant_id

get.description: Lists users with optional filters. Admins can list all users across tenants or filter by tenant_id. Non-admins are auto-filtered to their own tenant. Searchable by group_id (exact match), username (partial), first_name (partial), last_name (partial), or user_id (exact match). Admins can include soft-deleted users with include_deleted=true.

parameters.description: Filter by tenant ID (admin only - non-admins auto-filtered to own tenant)
parameters.name: tenant_id

parameters.description: Filter to users with a verified session from this provider (e.g. cybrid, facetec)
parameters.name: verified_provider

parameters.description: When true, include users with expired verification sessions (requires verified_provider)
parameters.name: include_expired

parameters.description: Only return users with empty first_name or last_name
parameters.name: profile_incomplete

403.description: Forbidden - user has no tenant assigned

get.description: Retrieves account details for the authenticated user. Use the include query param to control which optional sections are returned.

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of optional sections to include: wallets, auth_providers, verification_sessions, stats, privy. Omit to include all.
parameters.name: include

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile information (first name, last name, email)

409.description: Email or username already in use

post.description: Creates a Privy user for an account that doesn't have one. Only available in Privy mode.

400.description: Account already has Privy ID or Privy mode not enabled

get.description: Retrieves all group memberships for the authenticated user. Returns group ID and friendly name without the redundant user ID.
Returns the current user's preference settings (discoverability and notifications)

patch.description: Updates the current user's preference settings (discoverability and notifications)

post.description:
Syncs wallet addresses for the authenticated user.
If smart_wallet_address is provided in the body, only that address is synced (no Privy API call).
If no body is provided, fetches linked accounts and server wallets from Privy and syncs all wallet addresses.
Requires a Privy-authenticated session. Skips if wallet data already exists unless force=true.

parameters.description: Force re-sync even if wallet data already exists
parameters.name: force

parameters.description: Optional: provide smart_wallet_address to sync only that address
parameters.name: body

400.description: Not a Privy-authenticated session or no Privy user ID

502.description: Failed to fetch user from Privy

post.description:
Initiates a verification challenge for group membership. Supports sync providers (MaxMD, ActiveCampaign - immediate) and async providers (Cybrid - webhook-based).
The action determines which group the user is added to. Providers can define an action_group_map in their metadata to map actions to specific groups (e.g., add-ac-card-waitlist → AC: Card_Waitlist_Clicked).
Pass resolve_user: true in meta to include the user's email, phone, and name in the provider payload.

contacts_count.description: Number of contacts the user has

my_shares_count.description: Number of resources the user has shared

shared_with_me_count.description: Number of resources shared with the user

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.A.description: Request body for activating an invited user account using a tenant secret. When Privy auth is configured, a Bearer token is used to identify the user (email is ignored). When Privy auth is NOT configured, email is required to identify the user.

privy_user_id.description: Optional: use existing Privy ID instead of creating new one

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.A.description: Request body for changing a user's role
Request body for moving a user to a different tenant
Response body for user status change operations
Single asset balance with USD conversion
Authentication provider linked to the user account
Response containing EIP-7702 authorization signature components

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.C.description: Contact with resolved details. For linked contacts, details come from the user table. For custom contacts, details come from custom_* fields.

account_addresses.description: Enforcer wallet addresses (with address_type: eoa, smart_account)

kyc_verified.description: True when verified_provider is specified and user has a valid session

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.C.description: Create a new connection for a tenant to a specific provider
Create a linked contact (with contact_user_id) or a custom contact (with custom fields)
Request body for creating a new sharing intent

expires_at.description: ExpiresAt is the optional expiration time in RFC3339 format

is_public_read.description: IsPublicRead makes the resource publicly readable (mutually exclusive with user and group)

is_public_write.description: IsPublicWrite makes the resource publicly writable (mutually exclusive with user and group)

permission.description: Permission is the permission level (read, write, admin)

resource_id.description: ResourceID is the ID of the resource being shared

resource_type.description: ResourceType is the type of resource (file, kv, api_key)

shared_with_group_id.description: SharedWithGroupID is the group ID to share with (mutually exclusive with user and public)

shared_with_user_id.description: SharedWithUserID is the user ID to share with (mutually exclusive with group and public)

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.C.description: Request to create a new cryptocurrency wallet
Response containing newly created wallet details

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.E.description: Request to initiate email-based login (OTP). Provide either email or username.

tenant_code.description:
TenantCode selects which tenant to log into. Required when the email is registered in
more than one tenant (server returns ambiguous_email with the candidate list otherwise).
Also used to scope a new account to a specific tenant during registration.

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.E.description: Request to verify email login with OTP. Provide either email or username.

first_name.description: Optional fields for new user registration (only used when creating account via email login)

otp.description:
OTP is the numeric code delivered to the user. Normally 6 digits; the
server tolerates 4-5 digit submissions and left-pads them with zeros to
recover OTPs whose leading zero was stripped by JavaScript clients that
parsed the code as an integer.

tenant_code.description:
TenantCode selects which tenant the OTP is being verified for. Must match the tenant
chosen at /login when the email exists in multiple tenants. Also used to scope account
creation when registering a new user.

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.E.description: Request to export wallet private key (HPKE encrypted)
Response containing HPKE encrypted wallet export

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.G.description: Request to authenticate using Google OAuth

Initiates a verification challenge for group membership. The action determines which group the user is added to (via provider's action_group_map or target_group_name). Pass resolve_user: true in meta to include user details (email, phone, name) in the provider payload.

token.description: Sync provider fields (immediate verification - e.g., MaxMD)

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.I.description: Request to invalidate a previously issued nonce
Request body for sending a tenant invitation email to a pre-created user

ttl.description: TTL in nanoseconds: -1 if no expiry, -2 if key doesn't exist

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.L.description: Link a custom (invite) contact to an existing platform user

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.M.description: Response containing balances for multiple assets

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.P.description: Request to begin passkey/WebAuthn login. All fields optional for discoverable credential flow.

session_key.description: Send this back in the Finish request

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.P.description: WebAuthn options response with session key for the Finish step
Request to sign a personal message
Public account information returned after authentication

account_address.description: Ethereum address (for SIWE) or UUID (for email/Google)

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.R.description: Request to sign a raw secp256k1 hash
Request to refresh a JWT token
Response body when resolving a user by wallet address

wallet_id.description: New internal UUID for restored wallet

enforcer-v2_internal_delivery_http_dto.S.description: Request to authenticate using Sign-In with Ethereum
Request to sign and broadcast a transaction via Privy
Response from signing and broadcasting a transaction

created_at.description: CreatedAt is when the sharing intent was created

expires_at.description: ExpiresAt is when the sharing intent expires (null if no expiration)

id.description: ID is the unique identifier of the sharing intent

is_public_read.description: IsPublicRead indicates if the resource is publicly readable

is_public_write.description: IsPublicWrite indicates if the resource is publicly writable

owner_id.description: OwnerID is the ID of the user who created the share

owner_tenant_id.description: OwnerTenantID is the tenant ID of the owner

permission.description: Permission is the permission level granted

resource_id.description: ResourceID is the ID of the shared resource

resource_type.description: ResourceType is the type of the shared resource

share_target_type.description: ShareTargetType indicates the type of share (user, group, public)

shared_with_group_id.description: SharedWithGroupID is the ID of the group the resource is shared with

shared_with_user_id.description: SharedWithUserID is the ID of the user the resource is shared with

updated_at.description: UpdatedAt is when the sharing intent was last updated

A user item in list responses

kyc_expires_at.description: Expiration of the KYC verification session

kyc_verified.description: True if user has a valid (non-expired) Cybrid KYC verification
